premature_ejaculation_pme.description: Early or quick release - Venus affliction

indicators.explanation: Heat and haste affecting semen quality and control

indicators.condition: Venus in Fire sign (Aries/Leo/Sag) aspected by malefics
Venus in 6th house (house of quick resolution)

assessment.low_risk: No Venus-Mars/Ketu conjunction, Venus well-placed in earth/water
assessment.medium_risk: Venus-Mars or Venus-Ketu aspect, or Venus in fire sign
assessment.high_risk: Venus-Mars or Venus-Ketu conjunction in 1st, 6th, 7th, or 8th house

erectile_dysfunction_ed.description: Low vitality and performance - Sun and 7th/8th house affliction

indicators.condition: Sun-Saturn conjunction OR Saturn aspecting Sun
indicators.explanation: Saturn's coldness and restriction affecting vitality

indicators.condition: 7th house lord in 6th/8th/12th AND Saturn influence
indicators.explanation: Marriage significator weak with Saturn's delay

indicators.condition: Mercury or Saturn in 7th or 8th house

indicators.explanation: House of vitality and regeneration compromised

assessment.low_risk: Strong Sun in 1st/5th/9th/10th, no Saturn affliction
assessment.medium_risk: Sun in neutral house or mild Saturn aspect
assessment.high_risk: Sun debilitated, Sun-Saturn conjunction, or 7th/8th heavily afflicted by Saturn/Mercury

positive_indicators: Strong Sun and Mars in D1 and D9
Mars in own sign or exalted

frigidity_low_desire.description: Low interest or coldness - Saturn and Ketu influence

indicators.explanation: Saturn's coldness suppressing emotional and physical desire
Love planet in cold, restrictive sign
Overall chart leaning toward restraint over expression

assessment.low_risk: Venus and Moon well-aspected by Jupiter, fire/water balance
assessment.medium_risk: Saturn aspecting Venus or Moon, but Jupiter also present
assessment.high_risk: Multiple Saturn-Ketu influences on Venus, Moon, or relationship houses

physical_pain_issues.description: Pain or discomfort during intimacy - Mars/Rahu in 8th

indicators.explanation: Inflammation, heat, potential for physical discomfort
Unusual physical conditions, inflammation, intensity causing pain
Connection between intimacy and disease house

assessment.low_risk: 8th house supported by benefics, no malefic influence
assessment.high_risk: Mars/Rahu in 8th, or 8th lord in 6th with affliction

emotional_comfort.description: Feeling safe and connected during intimacy

compatibility_rules.reason: Air fans Fire - passion is stimulated and sustained
Fire scorches Water OR Water extinguishes Fire - intense but potentially exhausting
Earth contains Water - emotional depth with stability

calculation_factors: Sexual health indicators (low dysfunction = higher score)

element_descriptions.Air_Air: Mental - High variety and communication but may lack physical grounding
element_descriptions.Air_Earth: Moderate - Different rhythms; needs conscious balance between mental and physical needs
element_descriptions.Air_Fire: Excellent - Air fans Fire, passion is sustained and intellectually stimulated
element_descriptions.Air_Water: Moderate - Air creates ripples in Water; emotionally stimulating but potentially inconsistent
element_descriptions.Earth_Earth: Stable - High physical comfort and reliability but may become routine over time
element_descriptions.Earth_Fire: Good - Fire warms Earth, bringing creativity to stable physical passion
element_descriptions.Earth_Water: Good - Earth contains Water, providing emotional depth with reliable stability
element_descriptions.Fire_Fire: Intense - High passion but potential for burnout; needs grounding
element_descriptions.Fire_Water: Challenging - Fire scorches Water or Water extinguishes Fire; intense but potentially exhausting
element_descriptions.Water_Water: Deep - High emotional and sensual harmony; potentially too inward-looking
element_descriptions.Default: Balanced - Mix of elements provides variety
